channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Olympic Champion Hidilyn Diaz Joins UP College of Human Kinetics as Weightlifting Instructor
item.description: Hidilyn Diaz, the Philippines' first-ever Olympic gold medalist, has officially started teaching weightlifting at the University of the Philippines College of Human Kinetics. Diaz, known for her groun...

item.title: The 2026 Burning Man Temple of the Moon: A Temporary Space for Reflection
item.description: At Burning Man 2026, the Temple of the Moon, designed by artist James Gwertzman, takes center stage as a unique architectural and spiritual structure. Inspired by the Queen of the Night cactus, which ...

item.title: Historical Perspective on MPs Switching Parties to Join the Government
item.description: Floor-crossing, where opposition Members of Parliament (MPs) switch allegiance to join the governing party, has long been a feature of Canadian politics. While seeing four MPs switch in just four mont...

item.title: Government begins expansion of Tanga Port to improve efficiency
item.description: The Tanzanian government is moving forward with a major project to expand and modernize Tanga Port to boost efficiency and revenue collection. According to Tanga Port Manager Salehe Mbega, the plan in...

item.title: Irish TD criticizes high resale prices for Six Nations rugby tickets despite anti-touting law
item.description: A Fine Gael TD from Offaly, John Clendennen, has raised serious concerns regarding the ongoing practice of ticket touting in Ireland ahead of this weekend’s Six Nations rugby match between Ireland and...

item.title: Pholosong Hospital Patients Struggle Without Hot Water for Nearly Three Months
item.description: Patients at Pholosong Regional Hospital in Tsakane, Gauteng, have been without hot water for almost three months, severely affecting hygiene and infection control. The hospital's boiler broke down in ...

item.title: Josh Wardle launches Parseword, a digital take on cryptic crosswords bridging British and American puzzle traditions
item.description: Josh Wardle, best known as the creator of the viral word game Wordle, has unveiled his latest project: Parseword, a digital reimagining of the cryptic crossword. Unlike Wordle’s straightforward daily ...

item.title: Hawthorn Maintains Dominance Over Essendon Despite Strong Efforts from Merrett
item.description: In a highly anticipated AFL clash, the Hawthorn Hawks thoroughly outplayed the Essendon Bombers, despite a commendable performance from Essendon captain Zach Merrett. The Hawks quickly established con...

item.title: Justina Syokau Defends Her Dance Moves Amid Criticism from Kenyans
item.description: Gospel singer Justina Syokau has once again sparked online debate after a video of her twerking at Mueni Bolo's event went viral. Known for her controversial persona in the gospel scene, Syokau faced ...

item.title: Eucharia Anunobi Explains Public Backlash Over Her Role in Glamour Girls 2
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actress, Eucharia Anunobi don open mouth recently for Honest Bunch Podcast about how people dey judge her because of the role wey she play for 1996 movie, Glamour Girls 2. She yan sa...

item.title: Explosions Hit Tehran Amid Ongoing Iran-Israel Conflict, Leaders Attend Rally
item.description: On Friday, Tehran experienced severe explosions near a pro-government rally attended by senior Iranian officials, including President Masoud Pezeshkian and Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi. The blasts ...

item.title: Obidient Movement Defends Peter Obi as the Right Leader for Nigeria in 2027
item.description: The Obidient Movement don come out strongly against former senator Dino Melaye’s talk say Peter Obi no get the capacity to unite Nigeria. According to the group, Melaye no dey see the political mood c...

item.title: Ahn Hyo-seop from 'KPop Demon Hunters' to attend the Oscars ceremony
item.description: South Korean actor and singer Ahn Hyo-seop, known for his role in the popular series 'KPop Demon Hunters,' is set to attend the upcoming Oscars ceremony. This appearance highlights the growing interna...

item.title: Virginia University Shooting Under FBI Investigation as Terrorism
item.description: A fatal shooting occurred at Old Dominion University in Virginia, where Mohamed Bailor Jalloh killed one person and critically injured another before being overpowered by students. The FBI has classif...

item.title: Congo-Brazzaville Presidential Election Highlights Ruling Party Advantage and Fragmented Opposition
item.description: As Congolese dey prepare for their presidential election on 15 March 2026, e clear say ruling party, the Congolese Labor Party (PCT) dey highly organised while opposition dey scatter. Denis Sassou Ngu...

item.title: Pep Guardiola Earns 12th Premier League Manager of the Month After Unbeaten February
item.description: Pep Guardiola, the Spanish manager wey dey run Manchester City, don achieve another big milestone as him win Premier League Manager of the Month for February 2026. City no lose any match that month, a...

item.title: Impact of Declining Fertility and Musqueam Land Agreement on Canadian Cities and Real Estate
item.description: Canada is facing a significant decline in fertility rates, with the national average dropping from 1.60 in 2015 to 1.25 in 2025, well below the 2.1 replacement rate needed to sustain the population. A...

item.title: Powerful explosions hit Tehran near pro-government rally amid ongoing Israel-Iran conflict
item.description: On 13th March 2026, Tehran witnessed deadly explosions close to a pro-government rally attended by Iran's top officials, including President Masoud Pezeshkian, Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, and Ali...

item.title: University lecturers oppose new Public Service Commission retirement age rules
item.description:
University lecturers in Kenya have raised concerns over a new Public Service Commission retirement age framework that they say is unfair to academic staff.
The dons argue that the proposed structure...

item.title: Trump posts on Truth Social claiming U.S. military superiority over Iran following family photo
item.description: Former President Donald Trump shared a nostalgic photograph of himself with his parents at the New York Military Academy on Truth Social, before posting claims of American military dominance over Iran...
